name: sap-ewm
description: SAP Extended Warehouse Management (EWM) development skill. Use when working with warehouse structures, transfer orders (TO/WT), warehouse tasks, RF mobile transactions (ITSmobile), resource management, wave management, queue management, physical inventory, delivery processing, posting changes, BADIs and enhancement spots for EWM, ABAP APIs (/SCWM/*, /SCDL/*), performance monitoring (ST13 PERF_TOOL), or EWM IDoc integration. Covers decentralized and embedded EWM on SAP S/4HANA and SAP SCM.
